title: Tion (disambiguation)
content:
'''Tion''' can refer to several things:

=='''[[Canon]]'''==
[[File:TionMedon-SWBC68cvr.png|thumb|right|250px|Pau City Port Administrator, Tion Medon]]
===Individuals===
*'''[[Tion Medon]]''', the [[Port Administrator]] of [[Pau City]]
*'''Lord [[Tion (Lord)|Tion]]''', of the [[Galactic Empire]]
*'''[[Lamilla Tion]]''', [[sculptor]] and employee of [[Cygnus Space Workshops]]

===Locations===
*'''[[Tion Cluster]]''', in the [[Outer Rim Territories]]
*'''[[Kingdom of Tion]]''', an ancient kingdom
*'''[[Tion Hegemony]]''', a sector in the Outer Rim
*'''[[Lower Tion]]''', a region of space

=='''[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]'''==
===Events===
*'''[[Tion Hegemony rakghoul outbreak]]'''

===Groups===
*'''[[Embrace of the Tion]]''', a [[glitz]] band popular on Lianna
*The '''[[Honorable Union of Desevro and Tion]]''', a major government of the [[Expansionist Era]]
*'''[[House of Tion/Legends|House of Tion]]''', the family in control of the Tion Hegemony
*'''[[Tion Hauling]]''', a company
*'''[[Tion Industries]]''', a company
**'''[[Tion Mil/Sci Industries/Legends|Tion Mil/Sci Industries]]''', a company
*'''[[Tion Starfreight]]''', a company

===Individuals===
*'''[[Tion Medon/Legends|Tion Medon]]''', [[Master of Port Administration|Port Administrator]] of [[Pau City/Legends|Pau City]] on [[Utapau/Legends|Utapau]]
*'''[[Nenevanth Tion]]''', a [[Human/Legends|Human]] from [[Lianna/Legends|Lianna]]
*'''Lord [[Tion (Human)|Tion]]''', a member of the [[House of Tion/Legends|House of Tion]] and an [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] officer stationed on [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]] prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]
*'''Lord [[Tion (Pre-Republic era Lord)|Tion]]'''

===Locations===
*'''[[Greater Tion]]''', a region of space
**'''[[Tion Cluster/Legends|Tion Cluster]]''', a [[Star/Legends|star]] cluster in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]
***'''[[Allied Tion sector/Legends|Allied Tion sector]]''', a [[Sector/Legends|sector]] in the Tion Cluster
***'''[[Tion Hegemony/Legends|Tion Hegemony]]''', another sector in the Tion Cluster
****'''[[Tion system/Legends|Tion system]]''', a star system
*****'''[[Tion]]''', a planet
**'''[[Tion Trade Route]]''', a [[hyperlane]]
*'''[[Tion Commerce Tower]]'''

==See also==
*[[Tionese (disambiguation)]]
